untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (5-year growth rate, quarterly earnings growth, relative strength rank vs peers) that are not available in the allowed technical indicator set. Only price-action components (200-day MA break, 52-week low) could be translated using sma_200 and dc_lower (52-week Donchian). Earnings deceleration tracking and relative strength percentile ranking require external fundamental data.
translation_notes: Translated available technical conditions: price break below 200-day MA (close < sma_200) and new 52-week low approximated by Donchian lower band (close < dc_lower). Exit when price recovers above 200-day MA. Stop-loss set at 8% as specified. Fundamental conditions (growth rate, earnings deceleration, peer relative strength) cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and would require data integration beyond technical price/volume analysis.
